item.title: Teaching Resources
item.description: This page contains some teaching staff on mathematics that may be useful for the reader. Please feel free to use them under the CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license. List of books Maple Notes for Calculus Maple Notes for Ordinary Differential Equations Reference Solutions to Selected Exercises in Calculus Presentations How to Self-Publish a Book Online Using Bookdown Rmarkdown and Other Productivity Tools for Math Teachers Course slides MA336 Statistics MA321 Mathematics in Contemporary Society
